samples: The child laughed after the dog ran away.

phrases.phrase: The moonlight shines on the river.
I ate because I was hungry.
We stayed inside because it rained.
The child laughed after the dog ran away.
phrases.roman: namba ta [laughed] shu tet gi nes
phrases.expected: namba ta [laughed] shu tet gi nes

phrases.phrase: When the sun rose, we began walking.
phrases.roman: wo zes datbel dal ben bel gi
phrases.expected: wo zes datbel dal ben bel gi

phrases.phrase: Although it was cold, they continued.
I know that you are here.
She said she would return tomorrow.
The man who built the house is my friend.
If you help me, we will finish today.
phrases.roman: von sa ti kat mi ben mek che
phrases.expected: von sa ti kat mi ben mek che

phrases.phrase: We rested before continuing our journey.
phrases.roman: ben ta kan di gi gikal
phrases.expected: ben ta kan di gi gikal

phrases.phrase: Yesterday we walked to the river. The water was cold, but the morning was beautiful. We built a small fire and cooked food. After we ate, we watched the sunrise over the mountains. Then we returned home together.
phrases.roman: di ta ben gi pakal ye ta guwi ben ta kel nam nan kel nelto shu ta ben nel ben wi datbeldal kalye re shu ta ben gi lelja ben
phrases.expected: di ta ben gi pakal ye ta guwi ben ta kel nam nan kel nelto shu ta ben nel ben wi datbeldal kalye re shu ta ben gi lelja ben

phrases.phrase: I only saw the red bird.
phrases.roman: mi ta vat wi nanwi tet
phrases.expected: mi ta vat wi nanwi tet

phrases.phrase: Only I saw the red bird.
phrases.roman: vat ta mi wi nanwi tet
phrases.expected: vat ta mi wi nanwi tet

phrases.phrase: The toy was made by the child.
I think he knows that she left.
phrases.roman: mi ta mas ba hu ba gi
phrases.expected: mi ta mas ba hu ba gi

phrases.phrase: If you had not helped us, we would not have finished the bridge.
phrases.roman: von no ti kat ben ben mek kalye
phrases.expected: von no ti kat ben ben mek kalye

phrases.phrase: The woman who taught me said that the river had changed.
phrases.roman: wo ba ta zas kelhu mi se pakal cha
phrases.expected: wo ba ta zas kelhu mi se pakal cha

phrases.phrase: Why did the old hunter give the child his knife?
phrases.roman: wo zos ta di latetba ku namba pelmek
phrases.expected: wo zos ta di latetba ku namba pelmek

phrases.phrase: Time heals all wounds, but memory keeps the pain alive.
phrases.roman: pu kelguba tak gatdam hudito fes gat fo
phrases.expected: pu kelguba tak gatdam hudito fes gat fo
